title: helianthemum marifolium subsp. cinerascens
intro: Helianthemum marifolium subsp. cinerascens, also known as rockrose, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of rockrose include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
